mnemonics: Components are LEGOs: Little, Encapsulated, Graphical, Objects. Use them to build your UI.
keyPoints: Components are reusable, independent pieces of UI
They accept input via 'props' and return React elements
Components can be written as JavaScript functions or ES6 classes
commonMistakes: Forgetting to use a unique 'key' prop when rendering lists
Defining a component inside another component, causing it to re-mount on every render
